title: Add M2 benchmarks and long run invariants
summary: Add the M2 benchmark and invariant gate for 20 actors hauling/building plus 100 path requests under versioned invalidation.
acceptance: M2 invariant gate runs 20 actors hauling/building long enough to detect reservation leaks stale offers negative resources queue growth material loss and hash divergence
100 path requests under versioned invalidation report stale rejects node expansions queue backlog and reached-path checksums
Benchmark artifacts include Node pnpm OS CPU commit seed scenario tick horizon and final hashes
Baseline updates are reviewed artifacts and preserve 10 percent warning and 20 percent blocking thresholds
No product behavior fix threshold weakening silent retry or unrelated implementation is included

history.details: Created by WM-0032 M2 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.
Added M2 long-run invariant test, M2 work/logistics and path invalidation benchmarks, baseline/artifact evidence, docs and required gate plumbing; required checks and quality pass.

changes_requested: High: M2 gate accepts only 12 used actors despite 20-actor contract; path benchmark records 1 stale reject instead of contract invalidation coverage; committed artifact gitCommit is pre-implementation claim commit.

Addressed review findings: M2 long-run gate now uses all 20 actors, path invalidation benchmark records 20 stale rejects within 100 requests, and artifact was regenerated from committed implementation 5a7bb353; required checks and quality pass.
verified: No blocking findings; repair confirmed 20 actors, 20 stale rejects within 100 paths, committed-code artifact metadata, preserved thresholds, and required gates pass.

objective: Create the artifact-backed M2 performance and invariant gate before closeout.
forbiddenPaths: product behavior fixes to satisfy tests
benchmarkImpact: Adds reviewed M2 long-run and path invalidation artifacts and updates baselines only with explicit 10/20 percent threshold preservation.
reviewRouting: Owner completes to reviewer; project-director integrates only after artifact evidence and required checks are reproducible.
rollbackModel: Revert benchmark tests artifacts and baseline changes; leave M2 open and do not advance closeout.
ownerGate: Name exact artifact paths and hashes in the report
Run every required check before taskctl complete

sparkEligibility.reason: Benchmark baselines and long-run invariant gates require qa-performance ownership and independent review.

review.summary: No blocking findings; repair confirmed 20 actors, 20 stale rejects within 100 paths, committed-code artifact metadata, preserved thresholds, and required gates pass.
